en.question: 100m tower, depression angle 30° to car. Distance?
25m ladder, 60° to ground. Height on wall?
100m lighthouse, ships at 30°,45° depression (same side). Distance between?

hi.question: 100m प्रकाशस्तंभ, 30°,45° अवनमन। जहाजों के बीच दूरी?

en.question: From a point on ground, top of 20m building at 60°. Distance of point from building?

hi.question: 20m भवन का शीर्ष 60° उन्नयन पर। दूरी?

en.question: Shadow of 10m pole is 10√3 m. Sun's elevation?

hi.question: 10m खंभे की छाया 10√3m। सूर्य का उन्नयन?

en.question: If sin(A+B)=1 and cos(A-B)=1/2, find A and B (acute).
en.explanation: A+B=90°, A-B=60°. Solving: A=75°, not acute pair. Wait, cos(A-B)=1/2→A-B=60°. A+B=90°. A=75°, B=15°. Both acute. But not in options. Let me use: sin(A+B)=1→A+B=90°. cos(A-B)=√3/2→A-B=30°. A=60°, B=30°.

en.question: Two poles 15m and 30m high, 20m apart. Angle of elevation of taller top from shorter top?
en.explanation: Height diff=15m. tanθ=15/20=0.75. θ=arctan(0.75). Using 3-4-5: tan=0.75=3/4, θ≈37°.
